info.title: LicenseGatherer
info.description: Gathers licenses of a project and/or solution as a JSON file.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: CommandLineApplication.Parse, OK: CommandLineApplication.Execute, OK: CommandLineApplication.ExecuteAsync, OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole, String), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IHelpTextGenerator, IConsole, String))

options.name: --path
options.description: The path of the project or solution to gather the licenses. A directory can be specified, the value must end with \, then for a solution in the working directory is searched. (optional)

options.name: --outputpath
options.description: The path of the JSON content output. If the no value is specified some information is printed into the console. (optional)
